channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Coupe du monde 2026 : les TV Philips transforment votre salon en véritable stade de foot [Sponso]
item.description: Pour profiter pleinement du but vainqueur de Michael Olise en finale de la prochaine Coupe du monde de football (vers la 79e minute) et célébrer comme il se doit la troisième étoile de la France, faites confiance aux téléviseurs Philips Ambilight.

item.title: Has Google’s AI watermarking system been reverse-engineered?
item.description: A software developer claims to have reverse-engineered Google DeepMind's SynthID system, showing how AI watermarks can be stripped from generated images or manually inserted into other works. A claim that, according to Google, isn't true. The developer, going by the username Aloshdenny, has open-sourced their work on GitHub and documented his process, claiming all it […]...

item.title: ‘The days of using federal funds to further discrimination are over’: IBM to pay $17 million in first-of-its-kind ‘Civil Rights Fraud Initiative’ settlement – Trump administration anti-DEI push seeks to strip businesses of ‘inherently divisive policies’
item.description: The first settlement claim under the Civil Rights Fraud Initiative will see IBM pay $17 million to the US government.

item.title: Valve’s Steam Controller launch looks imminent based on new public records — and it might finally give me the perfect excuse to build a custom Steam Machine
item.description: Valve may not be ready to launch the Steam Machine just yet, but there's more positive news on its main accessory.

item.title: Google Meet débarque sur Android Auto, mais il y a un (gros) hic
item.description: Participer à une réunion Google Meet depuis l'écran de son voiture, c'est maintenant possible sur Android Auto. Mais entre les profils pros non supportés, l'absence d'écran d'attente et la question de la sécurité au volant, tout n'est est pas si simple.

item.title: Scientists Generated Solar Power After Dark, Thanks to a Trick Using Wood
item.description: In a new experiment, reengineered balsa wood stored sunlight as heat.

item.title: Anbernic’s new handheld is a pocket-friendly Android device with a swiveling screen
item.description: Anbernic, one of the most prolific makers of handheld consoles and emulators, isn't afraid to experiment with creative designs. After debuting a wireless controller with a heart rate monitor earlier this year, the company has announced a new gaming device with a square design, basic controls, and a swiveling touchscreen. What's not so creative is […]...

item.title: Ces écouteurs ouverts signés JBL, parfaits pour les sportifs, sont bradés à -30 % sur Amazon
item.description: Les JBL Sense Pro sont des écouteurs qui mêlent autonomie, design confortable, et un micro solide grâce à l'ajout de l'IA pour un prix de 120,24 euros au lieu de 179,99 euros grâce à Amazon.

item.title: Ben McKenzie vs. crypto
item.description: A few years ago, during the absolute peak of the cryptocurrency craze, a somewhat surprising skeptic emerged. Most people know Ben McKenzie from his acting work on Southland or Gotham, or would recognize him instantly as Ryan Atwood from The O.C. While seemingly everyone else was buying Bitcoin, McKenzie decided to figure out what Bitcoin […]

item.title: Samsung is hiking the prices of its Galaxy phones and tablets
item.description: Samsung is raising prices across Galaxy Z Flip 7, Galaxy S25 FE, and Galaxy S25 Edge phones, as spotted earlier by Phone Arena. Though the base model of each phone is staying at the same price, devices with higher storage are now up to $80 more expensive: Last week, Samsung also increased the price of […]

item.title: Apple and Amazon are teaming up to challenge Starlink’s smartphone ambitions
item.description: Amazon has made a deal to buy Globalstar's low-Earth orbit satellite network for $11.57 billion, snapping up its spectrum licenses, operations, and assets to combine with its upcoming Leo internet satellite constellation. Apple owned 20 percent of Globalstar, and as a part of the deal, Amazon will continue to support satellite services like Emergency SOS […]...

item.title: Microsoft wants to build its own, more secure version of OpenClaw for Copilot
item.description: New reports suggest Microsoft is working on its own agentic AI that could be so proactive, it replaces humans.

item.title: Voici la liste des Tesla compatibles avec le nouveau FSD qui arrive en Europe
item.description: Tesla vient de démarrer le déploiement de sa fonction la plus révolutionnaire, le FSD (ou Conduite entièrement automatique supervisée en français) en Europe, en démarrant par les Pays-Bas. Le problème, c'est que les Tesla les plus anciennes ne sont pas compatibles pour le moment. On fait le point.

item.title: D2 Mach 2 Pro : Garmin lance une montre luxueuse, ultra-connectée et spécialement conçue pour l’aviation
item.description: Garmin a dévoilé sa nouvelle montre connectée dédiée aux aviateurs, la D2 Mach 2 Pro, qui intègre des fonctions spécialement pour le vol ainsi qu'une connectivité LTE et satellitaire.

item.title: « Avec l’IBAN seul on ne peut rien faire » : le discours dangereux de Basic-Fit après son piratage
item.description: Suite au piratage de Basic-Fit, l'entreprise minimise les risques liés au vol d'IBAN. Un discours dangereux qu'il faut rectifier.

item.title: Why IT teams must bridge the growing gap in IPv6 monitoring
item.description: IPv4 has been the backbone of internet communications. However, IT teams must now look to the next stage of internet protocol.

item.title: Amazon buys the satellite internet company behind Apple’s SOS system
item.description: Amazon has today announced it is merging with satellite internet provider Globalstar Inc. to bolster Leo, its Starlink rival. Globalstar isn’t a household name but you do know its work, as it provides Apple’s emergency satellite connectivity for compatible iPhones and Watches. In a statement, Amazon says the deal will grow Leo’s space-based footprint and enable direct-to-device service for its burgeoning satellite network. An interesting wrinkle is Apple owns 20 percent of Globalstar, which it bought for $1.5 billion in 2024, but that didn’t get a mention. Instead, the release says Amazon and ...

item.title: ADT’s New Big Idea Is a Light-Up ADT Sign for Your Yard
item.description: When a simple logo sticker isn’t enough.

item.title: Sony Is Turning ‘Bloodborne’ Into an R-Rated Animated Movie
item.description: Plus, an 'Escape From New York' remake is on the way.

item.title: GoPro's Mission 1 offers 8K 60p video and interchangeable lenses
item.description: GoPro has seen its action camera market share diminish due to strong competition from rivals like Insta360 and DJI of late. Now, the company is fighting back with a new line of flagship cameras called Mission 1, designed to greatly improve the video quality offered by its current Hero 13 camera. The company also introduced a new Wireless Mic system similar to DJI's Mic Mini, along with a point-and-shoot grip and other accessories. "The combination of our new 50 megapixel one-inch sensor and ultra-efficient GP3 processor sets a new performance bar for compact cinema cameras, enabling resolutio...

item.title: GoPro’s New Plan to Beat DJI Is a Bigger Action Camera Built for Pros
item.description: With the Mission 1, GoPro is offering a supersized sensor and its first camera that can swap with a professional lens.

item.title: The heist of iOS 26
item.description: The most consequential YouTube video of Jon Prosser's career opens on Prosser himself, in a black hoodie and transparent glasses. The backdrop is familiar to viewers of his tech news channel, Front Page Tech, with warm, hanging lights and a bright white "fpt" logo behind him. Prosser stares meaningfully into the camera, and kicks the […]

item.title: Alienware’s new gaming monitor offers a 240Hz QD-OLED panel for just $350
item.description: Alienware has announced a new budget-friendlier QD-OLED monitor, the AW2726DM. As some of the numbers in the convoluted product name hint, it's a 27-inch QHD panel, with 2560 x 1440 resolution, HDR support, and a high refresh rate of 240Hz. But what really makes it special is its comparatively low price of $349.99. High-refresh OLED […]

item.title: Ecovacs’ new robovac spots and pretreats dried stains using powerful jets
item.description: Ecovacs announced a new addition to its Deebot line of autonomous cleaners with a new feature that could make the robovac better at cleaning floors in a single pass. The Deebot X12 OmniCyclone uses cameras and AI to identify dried stains on floors, such as muddy paw prints or spilled soda. Before cleaning the stain […]

item.title: GoPro goes bigger and pro-er with support for Micro Four Thirds lenses
item.description: GoPro is announcing its Mission 1 cameras, a new line of video-centric action cams with 50-megapixel, 1-inch-type sensors and the company's new GP3 in-house processor. Pricing is still TBD, but there will be three models launched in two waves: a base-model Mission 1 and the Mission 1 Pro will be available May 28th, and a […]

item.title: Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair season 2 needs to happen — but not the underwhelming version creators have already teased
item.description: I want Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair season 2 as much as the next person — just not the kind creators are already proposing.

item.title: What is the release date for Scrubs season 10 episode 9 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: The final episode of the rebooted Scrubs TV show will be released this week — here's when it will be.

item.title: I'll eat a hulking CRT monitor if this Analog TV Simulator app isn't the coolest thing you see today
item.description: 'No post-process filters — every artifact emerges naturally from the physics': Analog TV app delivers a mind-blowing simulation of CRT monitors.

item.title: The smartest wet-dry robovac yet? This new Ecovacs model identifies dried-on stains, pre-treats to soften them, then scrubs them away for spotless floors
item.description: The Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone uses camera and infrared detection to seek out tough spots, and employs high-pressure water jets to soften them.

item.title: GoPros get their biggest upgrade for 20 years with trio of ‘professional’ Mission 1 8K action cams — and one even supports hundreds of pro camera lenses
item.description: GoPro unveils its Mission 1 series with a trio of new 'professional' action cams plus accessories, which represent the biggest product shake-up for GoPro in 20 years.

item.title: Alienware 27 (AW2726DM) QD-OLED monitor review: A budget PC gamer's new best friend
item.description: The price of nearly every type of gaming gadget has skyrocketed recently. RAMageddon has caused the cost of memory to double or triple in the last six months, with companies like HP saying that RAM now accounts for more than a third of a new PC’s bill of materials. Meanwhile, the Xbox Series S/X and the PS5 have gotten price hikes, and a similar bump for the Switch 2 is starting to look “inevitable.” Even mobile devices are not immune, with Samsung jacking up the cost of the Galaxy Z Fold 7 nine months after release. But with the $350 27-inch QD-OLED (AW2726DM), Alienware hasn’t just created a...

item.title: 43% of AI-generated code changes need debugging in production, survey finds
item.description: The software industry is racing to write code with artificial intelligence. It is struggling, badly, to make sure that code holds up once it ships.A survey of 200 senior site-reliability and DevOps leaders at large enterprises across the United States, United Kingdom, and European Union paints a stark picture of the hidden costs embedded in the AI coding boom. According to Lightrun's 2026 State of AI-Powered Engineering Report, shared exclusively with VentureBeat ahead of its public release, 43% of AI-generated code changes require manual debugging in production environments even after passing...

item.title: Netflix abandonne tvOS : plusieurs fonctionnalités vont disparaître de votre Apple TV
item.description: Netflix abandonne l'interface native de tvOS sur Apple TV pour le remplacer par son propre lecteur. Cette évolution entraîne la disparition de plusieurs fonctionnalités, comme les commandes de lecture via l'application Remote.

item.title: Basic-Fit gym group data breach exposes details of over 1 million members — here's what we know
item.description: Unknown attackers breach Basic-Fit systems and steal names, emails, and more.

item.title: Lidl veut bousculer Free et les MVNO en lançant ses propres forfaits mobiles à prix cassé en France
item.description: L'enseigne allemande qui commercialise déjà des forfaits mobiles en Allemagne, en Autriche et en Suisse veut étendre ses offres à d'autres pays dont la France.

item.title: Amazon rachète le géant du satellite Globalstar pour 11 milliards de dollars et défie Starlink d’Elon Musk
item.description: Amazon renforce encore son ambition face à Starlink d'Elon Musk. Le match se jouera bien entre les deux géants américains. Amazon annonce le rachat de Globalstar.

item.title: Bloodborne is being turned into an R-rated animated film
item.description: It's not a PC port or a remake, but Sony is returning to the Gothic world of Bloodborne. There aren't many details yet - Sony says that "plot details are still being kept under wraps" - but the game is being adapted into "an R-rated animated feature," with YouTuber Seán "Jacksepticeye" McLoughlin (a known Bloodborne […]

item.title: Panne X (ex-Twitter) : le souci semble se régler
item.description: Une panne de X (ex-Twitter) empêche certaines personnes d'accéder au réseau social, mais le souci semble avoir été vite réglé. [ARTICLE MIS À JOUR]

item.title: Asus Zenbook A14 : ce laptop ultra endurant avec Snapdragon X Elite perd 200 € chez Darty
item.description: Grâce au SSD d'1 To, au Snapdragon X Elite et aux 32 Go de RAM, l'Asus Zenbook A14 est un parfait laptop pour tous ceux qui cherchent une machine à emmener partout. En ce moment, il profite d'une remise de près de 200 euros chez Darty.

item.title: Lucid Motors names new CEO, lands more money from Uber and Saudis
item.description: The search for a new CEO, which lasted over a year following the sudden resignation of Peter Rawlinson, is finally over.

item.title: Prises en charge étendues, optimisations, dispositif d’auto-réparation prometteur… Linux 7.0 est là
item.description: Linux 7.0 est officiellement disponible. Cette nouvelle version de l'OS libre, qui se répandra progressivement sur toutes les bonnes distributions, apporte avec elle une bonne dose d'améliorations et d'optimisations.

item.title: 150 km d’autonomie et radar intégré : le vélo électrique de Specialized est le monstre de vélotaf
item.description: Le nouveau Turbo Vado 3 de Specialized affiche une autonomie record, dispose d'un moteur plus puissant et d'un radar de détection Garmin pour une sécurité accrue. On fait le point sur ce VAE urbain suréquipé.

item.title: ‘Authorities can ask them to hand over data’: Report claims over 80% of Europeans don’t trust US and Chinese businesses to handle their data – Europe is desperate for homegrown AI, cloud, and telecoms as the rift with the US grows
item.description: Distrust of US and Chinese companies may have reached an all-time high, and Europeans want homegrown alternatives.

item.title: You can attend Pokémon EDM shows in Los Angeles and London
item.description: If you love Pokémon and electronic dance music, the Pokémon Company made the perfect event for you. As part of Pokémon’s 30th anniversary festivities, the company is holding EDM concert experiences called “Pokémon Night Out” in Los Angeles and London. American DJ Marshmello, known for wearing a marshmallow-like mask on stage, will be headlining the events, with Australian DJ Alison Wonderland as a supporting act. The experiences will feature custom sets and Pokémon-inspired visual storytelling. The events will be open to fans 16-years-old and up. It will be held at the Intuit Dome in Los Angel...

item.title: 7-Eleven is closing hundreds of stores: List of doomed retail locations grows in 2026 as chain seeks to reduce costs
item.description: Japan-based Seven & i Holdings, which owns the convenience store brand, recently delayed an IPO of its North American unit. Here’s the latest. Seven & i Holdings, the Japan-based owner of 7-Eleven, has announced that it plans to close hundreds of stores in North America over the next year.

item.title: Here's what to play if you love Crimson Desert according to someone with more than 160 hours in the game
item.description: These are the games to play if you're loving Crimson Desert, according to our reviewer of the game

item.title: 'Game Pass has become too expensive for players' says leaked memo as Xbox CEO plans to 'evolve' the service
item.description: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma has admitted that the company's Game Pass subscription service has become "too expensive" for players.

item.title: New ‘Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse’ Footage Just Swung Into CinemaCon
item.description: The third and final film in the 'Spider-Verse' trilogy is over a year away, but Sony just gave us a brand-new sneak peek.
